name: Claude Code Sandbox Prompt Test
description: SW 1.0 Claude Code agent validation flow using an explicit OpenShell workspace and the claude-code-agent runtime.

document.name: claude-code-sandbox-prompt-test
document.title: Claude Code Sandbox Prompt Test
document.summary: Provision a canonical OpenShell workspace, run the custom Claude Code durable workflow, and preserve inspectable artifacts.

input.promptPlaceholder: Describe the small workspace change Claude Code should implement.

with.stopCondition: Stop only after /sandbox/claude-code-output/marker.txt exists and the final response includes CLAUDE CODE SANDBOX VALIDATED.
with.prompt:
Use the custom Claude Code tool loop inside the current OpenShell workspace.

User prompt:
{{trigger.prompt}}

Execution rules:
- Use Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, and Grep only.
- Work only under /sandbox.
- First inspect the workspace with `pwd && ls -la`.
- Create /sandbox/claude-code-output.
- Create /sandbox/claude-code-output/marker.txt containing exactly CLAUDE CODE SANDBOX VALIDATED.
- Create /sandbox/claude-code-output/summary.txt with a concise summary of the requested work.
- Print both files and a directory listing for /sandbox/claude-code-output.
- End with a concise final answer that includes CLAUDE CODE SANDBOX VALIDATED.

agentConfig.name: claude-code-prompt-test
agentConfig.instructions: You are the custom Claude Code agent harness running through Dapr durable workflow activities. Use OpenShell-backed workspace tools only.
